design_plan: rng=42; AIDA: clear Orchids context → market proof → Super differentiation → CTA; hero math: 1120px max, 2–3 lines; bento density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep OK; button contrast black/white pills pass
headline: Super vs Orchids — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: Orchids explores messaging‑centric and experimental AI assistants. Super is built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and reuses a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time.
